GenAiFunction.description: Use this action if the user is trying to book a new reservation or book a room. This creates a new reservation. Gather the contact, check-in date, check-out date, and number of guests staying first. Provide a list of room types in a list to choose from based on the number of guests selected. Provide a list of available rooms to choose from and have them select one. Default the reservation status to Confirmed unless specifically told otherwise.
